info.title: PATHS Backend
info.description: PATHS — Hiring workflow backend with PostgreSQL, Apache AGE, and Qdrant

Create a new user assigned to the specified organization.
Only users with 'org_admin' role in this organization can call this endpoint.

Batch size is capped by ``JOB_SCRAPER_BATCH_SIZE`` / ``LINKEDIN_JOBS_PER_HOUR``
unless ``admin_override`` is used inside the service.

List jobs for the current organisation plus platform-wide scraped rows.

Scraped jobs are stored with ``organization_id IS NULL`` so they are
visible to every org without duplicating rows.

get.description: Return live agent status derived from recent scoring + ingestion runs.

get.description:
Return audit events scoped to the current organisation.
actor_id is matched against org member user IDs, or entity_id contains org_id.

schema.title: Response List Audit Events Api V1 Audit Get

get.description:
Return (or create) the current anonymized view for a candidate.

The view is what scoring agents receive — no PII included.

post.description:
Request de-anonymization of a candidate's full profile.

This creates:
  1. An HITLApproval of type "deanonymize" (status=pending).
  2. A DeAnonEvent linked to that approval (granted_at=None until approved).

The frontend should redirect the user to the approvals inbox to approve.
Once approved via POST /approvals/{id}/decide, call POST /candidates/{id}/deanonymize/grant
to finalize the event and reveal the profile.

get.description: Return the most recent de-anonymization event for this candidate in this org.

schema.title: Response Get Deanon Status Api V1 Candidates  Candidate Id  Deanon Status Get

post.description:
Propose the current shortlist for HITL approval.

Creates an HITLApproval of action_type="shortlist_approve".
The shortlist is considered "published" only after a recruiter or
hiring manager approves via POST /approvals/{id}/decide.

Returns 409 if a pending approval already exists for this job.

get.description: List bias flags for the current organisation.

schema.title: Response List Bias Flags Api V1 Bias Flags Get

get.description: Read bias_audit_log entries scoped to the current organisation.

schema.title: Response Read Bias Audit Api V1 Bias Audit Get

get.description:
List all evidence items for a candidate.

Query params:
  type      — filter by evidence type (cv_claim, github_repo, …)
  field_ref — filter by field reference (e.g. "skill:python")
  limit     — max rows (default 100, max 500)

schema.title: Response List Evidence Api V1 Candidates  Candidate Id  Evidence Get

get.description: Return a single evidence item.
List all source documents/profiles for a candidate.

schema.title: Response List Sources Api V1 Candidates  Candidate Id  Sources Get

post.summary: Trigger one immediate Open-to-Work sourcing run.

post.description:
Persist a draft outreach session and return the candidate-facing
booking link. HR can preview the link before clicking Send.

Create + send in one atomic call.

HR clicks **Send Outreach** in the modal; the backend creates the
session, replaces ``{{SCHEDULING_LINK}}`` with the freshly generated
URL, and sends via Gmail. The raw token is only kept in memory for
the duration of the request — only the SHA-256 hash is persisted.

post.summary: Create an Interview Intelligence session (alias of POST /interviews/).
Generate a single follow-up question for a previous turn.
Run the existing LangGraph analysis pipeline (eval + report + decision packet).

get.summary: Download a PDF version of the interview report.

get.description:
Spec-compliant aggregated health for postgres / apache_age / qdrant.

Returns:
    {
      "postgres":   { "status": "connected"|"error", "details": "..." },
      "apache_age": { "status": "connected"|"degraded"|"error",
                      "graph": "paths_graph", "details": "..." },
      "qdrant":     { "status": "connected"|"degraded"|"error",
                      "candidate_collection": "...",
                      "job_collection": "...",
                      "details": "..." }
    }

See `01_MASTER_DATABASE_INTEGRATION_INSTRUCTIONS.md` (Phase 2).
Basic liveness probe.
PostgreSQL connectivity check.
Apache AGE connectivity check.
Qdrant connectivity check.
Aggregated health check for every backend service.
Root-level aggregated health check returning per-service connectivity.
Root endpoint.
